meta.title: CryptoRenta - Cryptocurrency Tax Calculator for Spanish IRPF
meta.description: Calculate your cryptocurrency taxes for the Spanish IRPF from your exchange CSVs. 100% client-side, zero-knowledge, open source.
meta.keywords: IRPF cryptocurrency, crypto tax calculator, Spain crypto taxes, bitcoin taxes Spain, FIFO cryptocurrency, Koinly free alternative, crypto fiscal calculator
meta.ogTitle: CryptoRenta - Free Crypto Tax Calculator for Spain
meta.ogDescription: Calculate your cryptocurrency taxes for the Spanish IRPF. 100% private, no server, open source.
meta.twitterDescription: Calculate your cryptocurrency taxes for the Spanish IRPF. 100% private, no server.
meta.noscriptBody: CryptoRenta runs entirely in your browser. Please enable JavaScript to use the calculator.

home.heroSubtitle: Cryptocurrency tax calculator for the Spanish IRPF. Fast, private, and 100% free.
home.howSubtitle: Calculate your taxes in three simple steps.
home.step1Desc: Download your transaction history from your exchange and upload it here. You can upload multiple files.
home.step2Desc: Our FIFO engine processes all your transactions and classifies gains according to Spanish tax law.
home.step3Desc: View your tax boxes by year and review the full breakdown of every operation.
home.trustTitle: Designed for Your Peace of Mind
home.trustSubtitle: Your privacy is our absolute priority.
home.trustZkDesc: Your financial data never leaves your browser. All processing happens locally on your device.
home.trustOpenDesc: The calculation engine is fully transparent. You can audit the code and verify the results.
home.trustIrpfDesc: Automatic classification into Box 1, 2, and 3 according to current Spanish tax regulations.
home.ctaStart: Get started now. No registration needed.
home.footerDisclaimer: This tool is for informational purposes only. Consult a tax advisor for official filings.
home.exchangeComingSoon: Your exchange not listed? Contribute on GitHub

calculator.title: Calculator
calculator.subtitle: Upload your CSV files to calculate your IRPF.
calculator.heroSubtitle: Upload your exchange CSVs. The FIFO engine calculates your capital gains and losses according to AEAT regulations.
calculator.privacyBadge: SPA · Zero Knowledge · Your data never leaves your device
calculator.errorBody: An error occurred during calculation. Check your data and try again.
calculator.resultsSubtitle: Copy these amounts to Renta Web. The tax authority applies the percentages.

dropzone.helpBtn: Not sure how to download your CSV?
dropzone.guideTitle: How to Export Your Coinbase CSV
dropzone.guideStep1: Sign in to coinbase.com from a computer
dropzone.guideStep4: Make sure the base currency is EUR
dropzone.dropHint: or click to browse · Multiple files allowed
dropzone.dropAriaLabel: Drop zone. Click or drag CSV files here.
dropzone.historyWarning: Upload your full history since you opened the account, not just the tax year. FIFO needs to know all your previous purchases.

review.title: Review Before Calculating
review.subtitle: {sends} send{sendsPlural} and {receives} receive{receivesPlural} detected that need your confirmation.
review.unmatchedDesc1: These receives could not be matched to any outgoing transfer. Their acquisition cost will use the market price at the time of receipt.
review.unmatchedDesc2: If this asset comes from another exchange or wallet, upload its CSV too so the app can preserve the real acquisition cost through automatic matching.
review.ownTooltip: Own wallet — does not trigger a taxable event
review.thirdPartyTooltip: Payment to third party — generates capital gain/loss

results.irpfLabel: Results for the Spanish IRPF tax return (AEAT)
results.noDataBody: No transactions found for the selected tax year. Try another year.
results.cubo1Desc: Sales and swaps of cryptocurrencies. FIFO method per asset.
results.cubo2Desc: Interest and staking rewards received during the tax year.
results.cubo3Desc: Airdrops and rewards. Market value at the time of receipt.

assetBreakdown.title: Declaration by Asset
assetBreakdown.description: Copy these exact values, adding a new entry per asset in the Virtual Currencies section of Renta Web. If an asset has both EUR sales and crypto swaps, you'll need two separate entries with different counter-prestation types.
assetBreakdown.colOpsTitle: Number of sales and swaps for this asset
assetBreakdown.colCounterTitle: Type of counter-prestation received. Enter this in Renta Web.
assetBreakdown.counterBothTitle: Requires two entries in Renta Web: one for EUR and one for crypto
assetBreakdown.integrityWarning: Warning: the breakdown sum does not match the global total. Difference: {diff}

warnings.INSUFFICIENT_LOTS: Missing lots (likely due to exchange rounding). Make sure you've uploaded your full history.
warnings.SEND_AS_TRANSFER: Wallet-to-wallet transfer not subject to tax.
warnings.SEND_TO_THIRD_PARTY: Third-party send marked as disposal. Generates capital gain/loss.
warnings.CONVERT_PARSE_FAILED: Could not interpret the destination of a Convert.
warnings.RECEIVE_UNMATCHED: External receive with no matching origin transfer. The acquisition cost uses the receiving exchange's market price. If this asset comes from another exchange, upload its CSV too.

operations.noOpsBody: No transactions recorded for the selected tax year.
operations.sendOwnTitle: Own wallet — click if payment to third party
operations.sendThirdPartyTitle: Marked as third-party payment — click to change

export.txtHeader1: Report for the Spanish IRPF tax return (AEAT)
export.txtDisclaimer: This tool is for informational purposes. Consult a tax advisor.

progress.calculating: Calculating in your browser · No data leaves this device

guia.title: How to Download Your Transaction History
guia.subtitle: Step-by-step guide to get your transaction history.
guia.warningBody: Process ALL your historical CSVs from all exchanges for the FIFO calculation to be correct. If you only upload one year, the acquisition cost may be incomplete.
guia.step1Title: Sign in to your Coinbase account
guia.step1Body: Open your browser and log into your Coinbase account. Make sure you use the correct credentials.
guia.step3Title: Select Transaction history, CSV format, and date range
guia.step3Body: On the statements page, select "Transaction history". Make sure to choose CSV format and the full date range.
guia.step4Title: Download and repeat for all years
guia.step4Body: Download the CSV file. Repeat the process for each year you traded cryptocurrencies.
guia.compatibleFormatsDesc: Currently supports Coinbase CSV format. Coming soon: Binance, Kraken.
